title: Ninjadog Configuration
description: Schema for ninjadog.json configuration files used by the Ninjadog code generator. Defines the project settings, entities, enums, and relationships needed to generate a complete CRUD Web API.

$schema.description: Reference to the JSON schema for editor support.

entities.title: Entities
entities.description: Entity definitions for code generation. Each key is a PascalCase entity name.

propertyNames.description: Entity names must be PascalCase identifiers.

enums.title: Enums
enums.description: Enum definitions for code generation. Each key is a PascalCase enum name mapping to an array of string values.

propertyNames.description: Enum names must be PascalCase identifiers.

config.title: Project Configuration
config.description: General configuration settings for the Ninjadog Engine.

name.description: The name of the application or project.

version.description: The semantic version of the application or project.

description.description: A brief description of the application or project.

rootNamespace.description: The root namespace for the generated code. Uses dotted notation.

outputPath.description: The path where generated files will be saved.

saveGeneratedFiles.description: Whether to save generated files to disk.

softDelete.description: Enable soft delete support. Flat alternative to features.softDelete.

auditing.description: Enable audit fields. Flat alternative to features.auditing.

databaseProvider.description: The database provider to use. Flat alternative to database.provider.

corsConfig.title: CORS Configuration
corsConfig.description: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing settings for the generated API.

methods.description: Allowed HTTP methods. Omit to allow all methods.

headers.description: Allowed HTTP headers. Omit to allow all headers.

featuresConfig.title: Feature Toggles
featuresConfig.description: Optional feature toggles for the code generator.

softDelete.description: Enable soft delete support. Adds IsDeleted and DeletedAt columns and filters deleted records from queries.

auditing.description: Enable audit fields. Adds CreatedAt and UpdatedAt timestamps automatically managed on insert and update.

aot.description: Enable Native AOT publishing support. Generates AOT-compatible code with Dapper.AOT, slim builder, and JSON source generators.

authConfig.title: Authentication Configuration
authConfig.description: JWT authentication and authorization settings for the generated API.

roles.description: Role names for authorization policies. When provided, generates named authorization policies.

generateLoginEndpoint.description: Whether to generate a POST /api/auth/login endpoint.

generateRegisterEndpoint.description: Whether to generate a POST /api/auth/register endpoint.

provider.description: The database provider to use. Determines SQL dialect, type mappings, and connection factory.

entity.title: Entity Definition
entity.description: Defines a single entity with its properties, relationships, and optional seed data.

properties.title: Entity Properties
properties.description: Property definitions for the entity. Each key is a PascalCase property name.

propertyNames.description: Property names must be valid identifiers (PascalCase or camelCase).

relationships.title: Entity Relationships
relationships.description: Relationship definitions linking this entity to others.

seedData.title: Seed Data
seedData.description: Initial data rows to insert when the database is initialized. Each object must match the entity's property names.

entityProperty.title: Entity Property
entityProperty.description: Defines a single property on an entity, including its type and optional validation constraints.

type.description: The .NET data type of the property.

isKey.description: Whether this property is the primary key. Exactly one property per entity should be marked as the key.

required.description: Whether this property is required. Generates a NotEmpty/NotNull validation rule.

maxLength.description: Maximum length constraint for string properties. Generates a MaximumLength validation rule.

minLength.description: Minimum length constraint for string properties. Generates a MinimumLength validation rule.

min.description: Minimum value constraint for numeric properties. Generates a GreaterThanOrEqualTo validation rule.

max.description: Maximum value constraint for numeric properties. Generates a LessThanOrEqualTo validation rule.

pattern.description: Regex pattern constraint for string properties. Generates a Matches validation rule.

entityRelationship.title: Entity Relationship
entityRelationship.description: Defines a relationship between two entities.

relatedEntity.description: The PascalCase name of the related entity. Must match a key in the top-level entities object.
